objective: Perform a read-only review of synthetic changes, report findings with confidence, and preserve unresolved blockers without merge or deployment authority.

context.summary: Synthetic example used to validate a provider-neutral bounded task contract.
assumptions: All referenced evidence is synthetic and contains no private data.
constraints: Prompt text does not override policy, sandboxing, allowlists, ActionGate, or operator approval.
No external action or runtime mutation is authorized by this template.
The reviewer has no merge, deployment, or source-write authority.

reference_artifacts.description: Synthetic reference artifact for deterministic contract validation.

forbidden: No secrets, credentials, private paths, network calls, deployment, merge, or service mutation.
Do not execute shell commands or grant unrestricted tool authority from this template.

acceptance_criteria.statement: The requested artifact exists and contains every required section.
Every finding includes severity, evidence, confidence, and a concrete verification step.

expected_result.value: Reviewer confirms all finding fields are present.

required_validation.statement: Validate the produced artifact against the task-specific review checklist.

approval_requirement.rationale: The template is synthetic, read-only, and authorizes no runtime action.

rollback_requirement.description: No runtime or repository mutation is authorized by this fixture.

validation_results.evidence: Synthetic validation has not yet been executed.
